title: FX rates log
description: Daily FX snapshot from Frankfurter (ECB rates), base GBP. One history entry per run day; listings store the rate they were converted at, so this log is the audit trail.

history.description: Oldest first. At most one entry per date.

date.description: Date the rate was published (ECB reference date), not the fetch date.

rates.description: Units of each currency per 1 GBP.
